issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. Should specify: looking at top 5 cards, filtering for {Egghead} type cards excluding [Lilith], revealing up to 1 card, adding to hand, then placing rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL lacks all these details.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is extraneous and has no basis in card text. Should be removed.
Filter is set to 'Any' but should be type-based filtering for {Egghead} excluding specific card [Lilith].
